texto: ...as we proceed to higher and higher levels of expertise, and as the stakes get higher and higher, the agonies of excellence reappear in new and frightening ways. A tiny minority gets through to the top, to memorable excellence or profound understanding. The rest of us stop at stages along the way, perhaps for a temporary rest, perhaps for a period of reassessment. But once we stop, we are unlikely to start up again. Security is suddenly far sweeter than enterprise. The sufferings of the ascent, so long endured by insuppressible aspiration, suddenly seem pointless.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Grudin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “...as we proceed to higher and higher levels of expertise, and as the stakes get higher and highe…” articula lideranca, excellence, leadership em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como termino e leadership.

A tiny minority gets through to the top, to memorable excellence or profound understanding. The rest of us stop at stages along the way, perhaps for a temporary rest, perhaps for a period of reassessment. But once we stop, we are unlikely to start up again. texto: Because we believe that one moment is more or less like the next, we lose touch with the essential urgency of the present, the fact that each passing moment is the one moment for the practice of freedom.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robert Grudin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Because we believe that one moment is more or less like the next, we lose touch with the essentia…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, vida, living pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de living e time.

frase_original: Because we believe that one moment is more or less like the next, we lose touch with the essential urgency of the present, the fact that each passing moment is the one moment for the practice of freedom.

texto: ...Religious observances, once so full of suffering and awe, have become accommodating and benign. Teachers go out of their way to avoid embarrassing, insulting, overworking, or otherwise vexing their students. Each year public language is further purged of impurities that might injure sensitive groups. Prime-time television series seem dedicated to the comforting message that things are really okay.Indeed, modern society's war on pain has been vastly more successful than its war on pain's causes.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Grudin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “...Religious observances, once so full of suffering and awe, have become accommodating and benign…” articula motivacao, creativity, culture em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e trabalho.
